text.title: argocd-gitops Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for argocd-gitops as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using branches to model environments: main → staging branch → production branch.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each environment change requires cherry-picking across branches. Merging an urgent fix means applying it to multiple branches and hoping they merge cleanly. Ops teams end up managing branches like release managers.
